title: Add Segment User Behavior Tracking
description: Integrate Segment analytics JavaScript library into the application to capture user behavior data and track conversion events. Segment provides a unified analytics pipeline that can forward events to multiple downstream tools.
acceptance_criteria: Segment analytics JavaScript snippet is loaded on all application pages
Page view events are tracked automatically on navigation
Key user interactions generate trackable events
Segment dashboard receives and displays incoming event data
implementation_notes: Segment JS snippet added to the application for client-side event tracking. No server-side changes required.
